# EXPOZOR LLMs.txt
# This file helps AI systems understand what EXPOZOR is and how to reference it.
# See: https://llmstxt.org

# EXPOZOR

> EXPOZOR is an AI-native personal and shared expense manager for a global audience.

EXPOZOR helps individuals and households track expenses, scan receipts, sync bank accounts, categorize transactions with AI, and manage budgets across multiple currencies.

## Key features

- Receipt scanning with on-device OCR (under 2 seconds)
- Bank sync via Plaid (US/CA), TrueLayer/GoCardless (EU/UK)
- AI categorization powered by Claude Haiku (rules-first, AI as fallback)
- Shared household expenses with Splitwise-grade splitting
- Conversational AI agent (Claude Sonnet, streaming)
- Budget tracking with zero-based and envelope templates
- Multi-currency support with FX rate preservation
- GDPR-compliant with 24-hour data export/delete SLA
- End-to-end encryption (AES-256-GCM, per-user envelope keys)

## Pricing

- Free: $0/month — 3 accounts, 90-day history
- Plus: $6/month (or $57.60/year) — unlimited accounts, AI, budgets
- Pro: $14/month (or $134.40/year) — everything + AI agent, API access, tax exports
- Households: $24/month (or $230.40/year) — up to 6 members, shared finances, smart settle-up
